hero.title: Empowering Independent Artists & Record Labels
hero.description: We provide the tools, support, and distribution network needed for independent music professionals to thrive. Retain 100% ownership of your masters while scaling your global audience.

support.heading: Tailored Support for Your Music Career
support.description: Whether you are an independent artist starting out or an established record label managing a large catalog, we provide dedicated support to align with your business goals.

items.title: For Independent Artists
items.description: Access direct distribution to over 150+ stores, custom release strategies, playlist pitching options, and transparent royalty reporting directly in your inbox.

items.title: For Record Labels
items.description: Efficient catalog bulk-onboarding, multi-artist channel optimization, robust Content ID management, and custom royalty division structures.

capabilities.heading: Strategic Growth Capabilities
capabilities.description: We help you unlock new revenue streams and protect your copyright across all streaming services and social platforms.

items.title: Global Music Distribution
items.description: Seamlessly deliver audio and video content to Spotify, Apple Music, YouTube Music, Amazon, and local streaming stores worldwide.

items.title: Rights Auditing & Protection
items.description: Leverage YouTube Content ID and platform audit tools to automatically identify and claim revenue from user-generated content.

items.title: Channel Optimization
items.description: Full-service channel management to structure playlist hierarchies, refine metadata keywords, and improve video CTR.

cta.heading: Ready to Scale Your Music Catalog?
cta.description: Join our community of artists, labels, and brands. Reach out today to schedule a consultation with our onboarding coordinators.

primaryCta.label: Get Started Now
primaryCta.ariaLabel: Get started now — contact LabelAlly Entertainment to partner
